sourceAmbiguity: The auth callback visual language required semantic tokens not present as central aliases.
decisionTaken: Added central auth callback token aliases in design-system foundation CSS and documented the palette in a machine-readable token artifact.
whyThisFitsTheBlueprint: Route styling consumes central design-system tokens instead of ungoverned route-local color decisions.
operationalRisk: Future dark or high-contrast refinements should extend the central token modes rather than hardcoding route-specific overrides.
followUpIfPolicyChanges: Update docs/frontend/195_auth_callback_design_tokens.json and the foundation CSS together.
